output.sparql:
PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?battle ?battleLabel WHERE {
  ?battle wdt:P31 wd:Q441655 ; wdt:P276 ?location ; wdt:P196 ?victor ; wdt:P580 ?date .
  ?location wdt:P17 wd:Q274679 .
  FILTER(?victor != wd:Q274679)
  .
  FILTER(STR(?date) >= "500-01-01" && STR(?date) < "1500-01-01")
  .
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" .
  }
}
output.answer: No notable defeats of Austria (Duchy of Austria) during the Middle Ages were found in Wikidata based on the executed SPARQL queries. The most recent historical context indicates Austria (as the Duchy) typically participated in battles as part of the Holy Roman Empire, with notable defeats occurring later (e.g., Battle of Mohács in 1526, which is outside the Middle Ages timeframe). No relevant battles matching the criteria returned in the database.
